opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My knees and ankles have swollen to twice their size, and every time I try to crawl to the bathroom, my stomach goes into a severe spasm.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It all blew up in the last day — I can't walk or get to the toilet and the diarrhoea and pain are unbearable.

symptom_narrative.onset: colicky belly pain started yesterday morning, then the joints swelled up by evening
symptom_narrative.character: cramping stomach spasms with watery diarrhoea, and hot, swollen, agonising knees and right ankle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: 9-10 out of 10; I can't weight-bear at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: belly is lower down and all over; joints are both knees and my right ankle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: escalating over the day to total collapse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement or trying to walk, and the stomach spasms with movement
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: severe diarrhoea, exhaustion, and I feel dry and thirsty
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have Crohn's and get flares but never with the joints this bad and never all at once like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm bedbound, can't reach the bathroom, and I've had accidents

past_medical_history.how_managed: a biologic injection, but I've missed a recent dose because of a supply problem

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: missed my recent dose due to supply issues

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing relevant that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and can't get to the bathroom or reach water

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the dual gut/joint symptoms clearly but is in obvious pain

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home reading; cannot exclude a rising fever

objective_data_offered.value: both knees and my right ankle look hot, red-ish and huge, and feel like they're full of fluid
my mouth is really dry and I've had lots of watery diarrhoea
